summary: Every year on May 20, we celebrate International HR Day. This is the time for us to shine the spotlight on the valuable and irreplaceable role that you, as an HR professional, play in helping your organization succeed. Let’s look at what International HR Day truly means, why it’s important, and what you can do… The post International HR Day 2026: Celebrating HR’s Invaluable Role appeared first on AIHR .
title: International HR Day 2026: Celebrating HR’s Invaluable Role
